category_sources: Official GitHub README describes iOS Class Guard as a command-line utility for obfuscating Objective-C class, protocol, property, and method names.
source_facts.description says it is an Objective-C obfuscator for Mach-O executables.
display_name_sources: Official GitHub README heading uses the name iOS Class Guard.
docs_sources: Official repository README contains command-line options, examples, and usage notes.
repo_sources: source_facts.repo is already set to https://github.com/Polidea/ios-class-guard, so repo is returned as null per instruction.
tags_sources: Official GitHub README describes command-line use for iOS app symbol obfuscation.
source_facts.description identifies Objective-C, Mach-O, and obfuscator scope.
